changelog: Fixed: Download button removed from History screen, added native save to Routines screen — routines save to Documents folder on Android via Capacitor Filesystem.
Fixed: Edit routine drag reverted to handle-only — full-item drag broke button clicks, now matches ActiveWorkoutScreen pattern.
Fixed: Notification channel migration now version-keyed — re-runs on each update, removes Capacitor createChannel interference.
Fixed: Download button not responding — refactored handler to use workout ID lookup instead of closure-captured object, added explicit error toast.
Fixed: Drag overlay positioning — compact pill layout with grip icon so the dragged name stays near your finger.
Fixed: Dashboard patch notes — added v2.8.4 entry.
Fixed: Exercise card animation glitch — extracted SortableExerciseItem to stable module scope.
Fixed: Back button listener spam — useRef callback pattern in useBackButton.
Fixed: Notification sound delay — removed sound:'default' from createChannel.
